stories: Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the twenty-ninth of May, 2026
Here's one to kick off your Friday: bottlenose dolphins have names for themselves — unique whistles that other dolphins use to address them directly
They're one of the only non-human animals confirmed to call each other by name
In Singapore, fresh economic data landed overnight
8% — below the 2% analysts expected — and that follows this week's upward GDP revision to 6% for Q1
With inflation undershooting, there's room for MAS to ease
Also happening right now: the 23rd Shangri-La Dialogue is well underway, with Vietnam's President To Lam having delivered the opening keynote this morning
Iran, great-power competition, and Indo-Pacific security are dominating the room — exactly the agenda you'd expect when 44 countries gather in the middle of an active Gulf war
Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the twenty-ninth of May, 2026
On this day in 1953 — exactly 73 years ago — Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay became the first humans to stand on the summit of Everest
In Singapore, the 23rd Shangri-La Dialogue gets underway this morning at the Shangri-La Hotel, running through to Sunday
Forty-four countries, 54 ministerial-level delegates, and over 42 chiefs of defence forces
Vietnam's President Tô Lâm delivers the keynote — expect great-power competition, Iran, and Indo-Pacific security to dominate
On the economy, Singapore revised first-quarter GDP growth to 6 percent — up from the 4
And a new survey finds more Singaporeans are using Singlish at work, including in professional settings
US and Iranian negotiators reached a tentative 60-day ceasefire extension overnight
Good evening Sean, it's Thursday evening, the twenty-eighth of May, 2026
Archaeologists found three-thousand-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs, still perfectly edible
Your calendar is clear for tomorrow - no meetings
You're still at the Westin Desaru through the long weekend, so Friday is all yours
In Singapore, Singapore Airlines and Air New Zealand are adding more seats on the Singapore to Auckland route from late October through March - good news for connections south
And Pokemon trading card shows have become a quiet fixture of Singapore weekends, drawing collectors, families and young entrepreneurs
One of those cultural shifts that sneaks up on you
Washington reports the US and Iran have agreed a framework to extend the ceasefire sixty days, with the Strait of Hormuz to be de-mined and reopened
